application.name: Fluoroscopy Simulator
application.description: GPU-accelerated fluoroscopy (X-ray) simulator using differentiable rendering with Slang shaders

preprocess_synthetic.description: Generate a synthetic phantom and cache it for the demo mode

preprocess_dicom.description: Preprocess downloaded DICOM data and cache for the demo mode

download_data.description: Download the Multiphase CT Angiography dataset from Kaggle

run.command: bash -c 'set -e && kaggle datasets download -d adamhuan/multiphase-ct-anigography-2-datasets -p <holohub_app_source>/data && cd <holohub_app_source>/data && unzip -o multiphase-ct-anigography-2-datasets.zip && rm multiphase-ct-anigography-2-datasets.zip'

demo.description: Run C-arm sweep demo using a cached preprocessed volume (run preprocess_synthetic or preprocess_dicom first)
